items.name_en: 🔥New🆕Medium Flamenco Purse Handbag 👜Celebrity Style. The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with a signature knot on the side. This medium size is made of deer leather 🥰*Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Detachable donut ⛓chain decorated with 💚Anagram Pebble *🧸Ultra-light, soft, and scratch-resistant, easy to match. Comes with two shoulder straps, suitable for single shoulder or crossbody. Magnetic closure*Suede lining* LOE💎WE Silver Plated 🎁
items.name_cn:

items.name_en: Another new arrival messenger bag💕Size 33💕11376(Creamy Green💕Glossy💕Light Brown) The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first handbag for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. Now launching a spacious, soft Hobo bag made of soft Nappa leather and suede bottom cover.
items.name_cn:
Another new arrival messenger bag💕Size 33💕11376(Creamy Green💕Glossy💕Light Brown) The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first handbag for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. Now launching a spacious, soft Hobo bag made of soft Nappa leather and suede bottom cover.
Shoulder or crossbody
One external zip pocket and one internal slip pocket
Leather zip pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram embossed (no box)

items.name_en: Authentic Grade
items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
NEW IN
Small
Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5609 Size 19-13.5-6
Goya is a structured compact bag, very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It is a testament to exquisite craftsmanship and a new LOEWE product worth buying.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_en: Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
items.name_cn:
Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
👜The bow🎀 is not just decoration, but the only opening for the flap. The bag features only one brass bullet buckle with a delicate brand logo, no other hardware. It embodies high-end Western European traditional leather craftsmanship and design style. So it is lightweight, and the strap is adjustable in length, suitable for any height. This is very nice💃💃
👉Small Size:20*19*11.5cm. The body is very flexible calfskin with two compartments and a card slot. Fits a short wallet, phone, lipstick💄, compact, etc. The capacity is very impressive😇. You can even bring a Kindle😍😍10183#(Plain: Caramel/White)😘 Comes with box

items.name_cn:
Biker Puzzle⸂⸂⸜👊⸝⸃⸃In Stock!!️
Size: 24-16-10
🌟Biker Puzzle, the ultimate battle bag for cool girls, 2025 is bound to be hot!
Top-tier soft nappa leather vs. cold hard metal chains
This ultimate collision is the DNA of the Biker series!
🌟Soft to the touch, fierce to the look
Wear it and become the cool girl who masters both elegance and rebellion!
🌟Shoulder, crossbody, or handbag, one bag three ways, easily switch between high-street, retro, and techwear styles!

items.name_en: Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
items.name_cn:
Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip handbag interprets a classic style with soft texture and practical function, while continuing the series' signature details. Featuring creative stitching and a flip structure, it easily converts from a shoulder bag to a close-fitting Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated
Dimensions 15-22-21
.

items.name_en: Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
items.name_cn:
Flash sale! Brand new! No defects! No returns, no shipping. No box or packaging
Large Irapala palm fiber and calfskin 🐂
basket handbag
Lots of celebrities have this
A traditional basket handbag
Features a classic hand-woven tubular calfskin strap and a calfskin 🐽🐽 embossed patch
This smaller size is made from Irapala palm, a palm tree grown, harvested, and sun-dried in Colombia, then woven by female artisans guided by fair trade principles at Corporación Oficio y Arte
Due to handcrafting, dimensions may vary slightly, making each purchase unique!
A summer essential woven bag. If you have to choose one bag for summer 👛, it must be a woven bag
Suitable for daily wear and weekend outings, instantly bringing the summer vibe
Anagram basket handbag. A classic hand-woven basket bag. Just throw it on for a vacation look ◇ A summer must-have
Size: 46cm~24cm~15cm
